productDisplayName: Flying Machine Women Lowrise Black Jeans
description: Composition Black washed denim jeggings made of 76.2% cotton, 20.9% polyester and 2.9% spandex, has two insert pockets on the front side, two patch pockets on the back with thread detailing, brand patch appliqued on the waistband at the back and metal zipper and button closure Fit Low-rise Wash care Machine wash cold water Do not tumble dry Turn inside out before drying Don't dry in direct sunlight Use warm iron Do not iron on print If you're a denim person, these black jeggings from flying machine will delight you. Low-rise, with a great skinny fit, you might not want to take them off once you pull them on! Perfect companion for your t-shirts and sexy tops.
